info.title: Red Teaming Management API
info.description: Red Teaming Management API - Configure and manage security groups and rules for AI/ML model scanning

get.description: List all scan targets with pagination and filtering support.

get.summary: Get a target by UUID with full details
get.description: Retrieve a specific target by UUID with complete configuration details and masked connection parameters.

put.summary: Update a target with optional validation
put.description: Update an existing target with new configuration and optional validation control.

delete.description: Permanently delete a target and its encrypted configuration data.

put.description: Update target background and additional context fields without connection validation.

get.description: Get profiling results including merged user and profiler data.

post.description: Send profiling questions to a target using provided connection parameters. Returns TargetResponseSchema with target_background and additional_context populated from probe responses.
Validate OAuth2 credentials by fetching a test token. For HEADERS and BASIC_AUTH, validates field presence only.

get.description: Get the metadata for targets.

schema.title: Response Get Scan Metadata V1 Template Target Metadata Get

get.description: Get the list of available templates for scan targets

post.summary: Create a new custom prompt set
post.description: Create a new custom prompt set.

get.description: List all custom prompt sets with pagination and filtering support.

parameters.name: archive

schema.description: Filter by archive status (None=non-archived only, True=archived only, False=non-archived only)
schema.title: Archive

parameters.description: Filter by archive status (None=non-archived only, True=archived only, False=non-archived only)

get.summary: Get a prompt set by UUID with full details
get.description: Retrieve a specific prompt set by UUID with complete details including properties.

put.description: Update prompt set details including name, description, and properties.

put.summary: Archive or unarchive a prompt set
put.description: Archive or unarchive a prompt set to manage its lifecycle.

post.summary: Create a new prompt in a prompt set
post.description: Create a new prompt in a prompt set.

get.summary: List prompts in a prompt set
get.description: List all prompts within a specific prompt set with pagination and filtering.

get.summary: Get a specific prompt by UUID
get.description: Get a specific prompt by UUID.
Get all available property names for use in prompt sets.

post.description: Create a new property name that can be used in prompt sets.

get.summary: Get all values for a property name
get.description: Get all available values for a specific property name.

post.description: Create a new value for an existing property name.

get.summary: Get values for multiple property names
get.description: Get values for multiple property names in a single request.

post.summary: Upload CSV file with custom prompts
post.description: Upload a CSV file containing custom prompts with properties for a specific prompt set.

get.summary: Download CSV template for a prompt set
get.description: Download a CSV template with columns for the prompt set's properties.
List all active custom prompt sets available for use by data plane. Returns only sets with snapshots.
Get current reference information for a prompt set including latest version.
Get detailed version information for a specific prompt set version.
Returns target counts by type for dashboard display.

post.description: Request to create a new instance for given TSG for AI Red Teaming

get.description: Request to get an instance by tenant ID for AI Red Teaming

get.description: Retrieve the current EULA content text.

get.description: Check if the EULA has been accepted for the current tenant (TSG).

post.description: Record acceptance of the EULA for the current tenant (TSG).
Get existing registry credentials or create new ones for the current tenant.

MultiTurnStatefulConfig.title: MultiTurnStatefulConfig
MultiTurnStatefulConfig.description:
Configuration for stateful multi-turn targets (session_supported=true).

Stateful targets maintain conversation state on the server side using session IDs.
The session ID is extracted from responses and injected into subsequent requests.

assistant_role.title: Assistant Role
assistant_role.description: Role name for assistant messages in conversation history (e.g., 'assistant', 'bot', 'model')
assistant_role.help_text: If not provided, will auto-detect from connection type (OPENAI='assistant', BEDROCK='assistant', etc.)

MultiTurnStatelessConfig.title: MultiTurnStatelessConfig
MultiTurnStatelessConfig.description:
Configuration for stateless multi-turn targets (session_supported=false).

Stateless targets require the client to maintain and send conversation history.
The assistant_role specifies the role name used for assistant messages in the history.

TargetAdditionalContext.title: TargetAdditionalContext
TargetAdditionalContext.description:
Additional context - used in create/update API requests and stored in DB/GCS.

Single value fields are strings.
List fields are lists of strings.

target_id.title: Target Id
target_id.description: Existing target UUID. When provided and auth_config contains redacted values, actual credentials are fetched from secrets manager.

network_broker_channel_uuid.title: Network Broker Channel Uuid
network_broker_channel_uuid.description: Network broker channel UUID. When provided, OAuth2 token requests are routed via network broker.

TargetAuthValidationRequestSchema.title: TargetAuthValidationRequestSchema
TargetAuthValidationRequestSchema.description: Request schema to validate target authentication configuration.

TargetAuthValidationResponseSchema.title: TargetAuthValidationResponseSchema
TargetAuthValidationResponseSchema.description:
Response schema from target authentication validation.

On failure, the service raises airs_common exceptions (ValidationError,
AuthError, etc.) which are converted to HTTP error responses by middleware.

use_case.title: Use Case
use_case.description: Primary use case (e.g., Customer Support, Code Assistant)

TargetBackground.title: TargetBackground
TargetBackground.description:
Target background - used in create/update API requests and stored in DB/GCS.

Required fields for activation:
- industry (string, required)
- use_case (string, required)

Optional field:
- competitors (list of strings)

additional_context.description: Additional context: base_model, system_prompt, languages, etc.

TargetContextUpdateSchema.title: TargetContextUpdateSchema
TargetContextUpdateSchema.description:
Request schema for updating target profile (background + additional context).

Used by PUT /{target_uuid}/profile endpoint.
User provides plain values which are saved directly to DB and GCS.

WebSocketConnectionParamsRedactBase.title: WebSocketConnectionParamsRedactBase
WebSocketConnectionParamsRedactBase.description:
Redacted connection parameters for WebSocket targets.

MRO: WebSocketConnectionParamsRedactBase → RestConnectionParamsRedactBase
     → WebSocketConnectionParamsBase → RestConnectionParamsBase.
Both RestConnectionParamsRedactBase and WebSocketConnectionParamsBase inherit
from RestConnectionParamsBase (diamond). Pydantic v2 deduplicates field validators
by name, so WebSocketConnectionParamsBase.validate_url (ws/wss) overrides
RestConnectionParamsBase.validate_url (http/https) — ws:// URLs are accepted.
